events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Atlanta Falcons

headlines.description: — The Los Angeles Chargers keep having to find new placekickers, and they keep giving the new guys game balls.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dicker kicks winner to lift Chargers over Falcons 20-17

headlines.description: — Tua Tagovailoa held two thumbs up as he walked off the field following another big performance that helped propel the Dolphins to a win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tua, Dolphins outlast Bears on Fields' record rushing day

headlines.description: — A homemade sign hanging high in Paycor Stadium advised fans to “ Stay Calm and Let Joe Cook.”
headlines.shortLinkText: Mixon scores 5 TDs, Bengals dominate Panthers 42-21

events.name: Green Bay Packers at Detroit Lions

headlines.description: — There was no one close to Shane Zylstra when the Detroit Lions tight end caught his first NFL touchdown on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lions activate Zylstra brothers; TE Shane catches TD in win

events.name: Indianapolis Colts at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — When Patriots linebacker Matt Judon is lined up alongside Lawrence Guy, he expects good things to happen.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pats get 9 sacks in dominant 26-3 victory over Colts

events.name: Buffalo Bills at New York Jets

headlines.description: — The sky was falling for the New York Jets against the Buffalo Bills.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wilson, Jets' defense stun Allen, Bills in 20-17 victory

headlines.description: — Kirk Cousins got the game ball after leading the Minnesota Vikings to a comeback victory against the team he started his NFL career with, and the first thought that came to his mind was starting...
headlines.shortLinkText: Vikings come back to beat Commanders for 6th consecutive win

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Jacksonville Jaguars

headlines.description: — Jacksonville's Tyson Campbell believes he can cover anyone in the league. His confidence had to be wavering at least a little at halftime against Davante Adams.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jaguars rally from 17-0 deficit to beat Raiders 27-20

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — Tom Brady stepped to the podium and reiterated how good it felt to stop his longest losing streak in 20 years.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brady throws last-minute TD pass, Bucs beat Rams 16-13

events.name: Tennessee Titans at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — Patrick Mahomes was probably having flashbacks Sunday night to his days at Texas Tech, when he would scramble around like a kid playing sandlot football while routinely throwing the ball 60-plus times in a game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mahomes helps Chiefs rally past Titans 20-17 in overtime
